历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 316 → 164 → 143 → 97, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advancement of about 219 places in the past 3 years; the provincial science enrollment plan was 17 in 2021 → 9 in 2022 → 7 in 2023 → 3 in 2024, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 physics category plan has only 2 places, further reducing enrollment compared to 2024, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, member of the C9 League; ranked 12th in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top national universities (Top 20), with stable rankings in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; ranked 10th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high attention for applications; the 2025 reputation evaluation is also neutral/mixed; Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Civil Engineering A, etc., with 17 disciplines rated A- or above, top engineering strength nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., have consistently high social popularity, highly matching HIT's advantageous engineering fields; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000 (uncertain), with about 30,000 science candidates in recent years, and the candidate scale is basically stable; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Qinghai Province, but as a top C9 university, it has strong cross-provincial appeal; the local enrollment proportion is extremely small (only 3 in 2024), and regional factors have limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous advancement trend of historical rankings (2021: 316 → 2024: 97), the further reduction of the 2026 enrollment plan (3 → 2), the good school reputation and high Douyin popularity, and the continuously rising popularity of advantageous engineering majors, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to advance. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 103, with a range of 53–153.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Elite Bachelor-Master-PhD Continuous Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment and Advanced Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Human Settlements)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Qinghai science only recruits 2 students for the Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class). Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (53–153) can aim for this; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<53) can consider it as a key option; those with rankings close to the upper limit (>153) need to be cautious. It is recommended to take this major as a sprint target while preparing other 985 universities as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 823 → 473 → 240, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 583 places in the last two years; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan remained stable at 3 students from 2022 to 2024; in 2026, the history category enrollment plan increased to 6 students, a 100% expansion compared to 2024, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, a member of the C9 League; ranked 12th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top universities in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; ranked 10th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; HIT is known for engineering, with fewer liberal arts programs; the Economics and Management Experimental Class covers business administration, accounting, sociology, law, etc., with relevant discipline evaluations: Business Administration A-, Sociology A- (reference to similar institutions).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of economics and management majors is divided and waiting, while the overall application heat for liberal arts is stable; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain), with about 17,000 liberal arts candidates in recent years, and the candidate scale is basically stable; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Qinghai Province, but as a top C9 university, its cross-provincial appeal is strong; the local enrollment proportion is extremely small (only 3 in 2024), so geographical factors have limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (823 in 2022 → 240 in 2024), the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (3 → 6 students), the good university reputation and high Douyin popularity, the expansion effect and popularity effect offset each other. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly decline compared to 2024, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 364, in the range of 314–414.
